title: Welcome to the OpenWrt Project
note: Open-source router operating system relevant to community networking, local ISP equipment, and open broadband alternatives.

title: OpenWISP
note: Open-source network management platform for OpenWrt deployments, provisioning, monitoring, VPNs, mesh, hotspots, and firmware operations.

title: LibreMesh
note: OpenWrt-based free software framework for decentralized community wireless mesh networks.

title: How Althea Works
note: Documentation for decentralized ISP routing and billing mechanisms that enable local operators to provide and be paid for connectivity.
